overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark, grassy trail at night. The camera moves steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall grass and trees, illuminated by a dim light source, creating an atmospheric and isolated environment typical of exploration or survival game footage.

tall wild grass lining the left side of the path
tall wild grass lining the right side of the path
dark silhouette of trees forming the forest edge on the left
dense dark trees and foliage on the right side of the trail
dark night sky visible above the tree line

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail through dense tall grass at night. The path is flanked by dark silhouettes of trees on both sides, with limited visibility beyond the immediate reach of the light source. The environment remains consistent throughout, maintaining an isolated and atmospheric nighttime setting in a natural woodland area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a secluded dirt trail that maintains a consistent sense of isolation through a dark woodland. It begins by pushing forward into a narrow path carved through dense, towering grass under the cover of night. As the camera advances, the light source reveals the immediate surroundings while the periphery remains shrouded in deep shadow. The scene then persists in its steady progression, flanked by the looming silhouettes of trees that frame the trail. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the natural environment, preserving the atmospheric tension of the nighttime wilderness.
